title: Lead SEO Specialist at Boat Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Boat Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Boat Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Boat Digital Technologies:
Boat Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boat Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
